issues.description: DSL is missing the Blocker ability entirely. The card has two distinct effects: (1) Blocker keyword/counter ability, and (2) On Play power boost. Only the On Play effect is represented.

Target specifies 'maxPower:4000' but the condition should be 'maxPower' with value 4000 to match 'with 4000 power or less'. Current structure may be correct depending on implementation, but verify the operator is ≤ not <.

effects.description: After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.
